about_quotes.speaker: Steve Wilson
about_quotes.evidence: So anytime we can put it together for more than a couple of days we feel very happy. ... Adam Cruz is always on the road with different people... And I stay pretty busy doing other things.
about_quotes.doc_title: Steve Wilson interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, October 25, 2002
